prestazioni: Engine: Z20LEH (2.0L Turbo I4) – Full forged internals including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (88.5mm, 9.0:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings. Upgraded crankshaft with ARP main studs and billet steel flywheel (Spec Clutch 240mm twin-disc).

Forced Induction: Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe (Milltek Sport catless), TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate, and PTP 3.5" silicone charge pipes with V-band clamps. Supporting mods include a Bosch 044 fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup.

Suspension & Handling: KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers (24-way rebound, 16-way compression, adjustable top mounts) with polybushings (SuperPro 60mm front control arms, rear subframe bushings). AP Racing 6-pot front calipers (355mm discs) with Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with a Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake line kit. Rear setup includes a Wavetrac LSD and custom 25mm rear anti-roll bar (Whiteline).
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (Vauxhall Vectra B-specific, 30mm extended fenders) with custom carbon fiber front splitter (Seibon) and adjustable rear wing (Varis Japan, 3-piece aluminum). Underbody diffusers by APR Performance (carbon fiber, 3-stage).

Exterior: Full respray in PPG 'Sunset Orange' with 3M Matte Black vinyl wrap on roof, mirrors, and side skirts. OEM+ headlight retrofit with Morimoto XB LED projectors (3000K), sequential LED turn signals (VLand), and custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon, vented).

Wheels & Stance: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (9x18 ET30 front, 10.5x18 ET25 rear) with Nitto NT05R tires (255/35/18 front, 285/35/18 rear). Custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 25mm rear) and Air Lift Performance 3P management for static drop (-35mm front, -40mm rear).
